steps: Go to https://dashboard.clerk.com and log in or create a free account
Select your application from the dashboard (or create one)
In the left sidebar, click 'API Keys'
Copy the 'Secret key' (starts with sk_test_ for development or sk_live_ for production)
Store the key immediately — it cannot be retrieved after you navigate away

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Secret Key
credential_fields.description: Your Clerk Secret Key (Backend API key for your application)

notes: Each Clerk application has its own secret key — make sure to use the key for the correct app
Development keys start with sk_test_, production keys start with sk_live_
The secret key grants full backend access to your application — never expose it client-side
Free tier is available with generous limits for development
All API requests must include the key as: Authorization: Bearer sk_...

test_endpoint.description: List users to verify the secret key is valid
